title: Increased hailstorms in cities through cell merger mechanism across North America and East Asia
description: This study reveals a merger-type hailstorm formation pathway that is twice as frequent and more intense than traditional hailstorms and is projected to increase in North American cities, potentially amplified by anthropogenic influence.
content:
• Púik, T. et al. Large hail incidence and its economic and societal impacts across Europe. Monthly Weather Rev.147, 39013916 (2019). Google Scholar 
  • Allen, J. T. et al. Understanding ha… [+16356 chars]
de: Erhöhte Hagelstürme in Städten durch Zellfusionsmechanismen in Nordamerika und Ostasien. Diese Studie zeigt einen Entstehungspfad für Hagelstürme vom Fusionstyp auf, der doppelt so häufig und intensiver ist als herkömmliche Hagelstürme und voraussichtlich in nordamerikanischen Städten zunehmen wird, was möglicherweise durch anthropogenen Einfluss verstärkt wird.
en: Increased hailstorms in cities through cell merger mechanism across North America and East Asia. This study reveals a merger-type hailstorm formation pathway that is twice as frequent and more intense than traditional hailstorms and is projected to increase in North American cities, potentially amplified by anthropogenic influence.
la: Grandines in urbibus auctae per mechanismum cellae mergarum trans Americam septentrionalem et Asiam orientalem. Hoc studium formationis merger-typi manifestat iter grandinis, quod bis tam frequentem et vehementiorem quam traditam grandines est et proicitur ad augendas in urbibus Americae septentrionalis, potentia ab anthropogenica influxu amplificata.
